# Chapter 16: Coupled human-technical systems  (~110 pp)
- 16.1 The operator in the loop (12) · 16.2 Human factors and ergonomics (15) · 16.3 Automation surprises (Bainbridge's paradox) (15) · 16.4 Levels of automation (12) · 16.5 Mode confusion and shared control (15) · 16.6 Trust calibration in automated systems (15) · 16.7 Failure section: Three Mile Island, Air France 447, Tesla Autopilot incidents (26)

**Archetype**: interface, ethics, failure. **Project**: redesign the interface of one piece of household automation; defend the choices. **Exercises**: 25.
